zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Croft於1458年出生在英國賀福爾卡芙特時，她的父親Richard de Croft I31歲，母親Eleanor Cornewall23歲。她於大約1470年與Thomas Blount在英國英格蘭史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和12個女兒的父母。她去世於1549年9月27日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾吉德米斯特享年91歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾吉德米斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Croft于1458年出生在英国賀福爾卡芙特时，她的父亲Richard de Croft I31岁，母亲Eleanor Cornewall23岁。她于大约1470年与Thomas Blount在英国英格兰史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和12个女儿的父母。她去世于1549年9月27日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾吉德米斯特享年91岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾吉德米斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Croft
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places, for example in Lincolnshire, Lancashire, Herefordshire, and North Yorkshire, all named with Old English croft ‘small arable enclosure (normally adjoining a house)’, or a topographic name for someone who lived by a croft, from Middle English croft.
English: possibly in some cases a variant of   Craft   2.
Americanized form of German, Danish, Swedish, or Jewish   Kraft  . Compare   Kroft   and   Craft  .

variants.name: Craft
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English craft ‘skillful, clever, learned’.
English: habitational name from Croft in Leicestershire. See also   Croft  .
Americanized form of German, Danish, Swedish, or Jewish   Kraft  . See also   Croft  .

variants.name: Crate
meanings: English (Hampshire and Surrey): from Middle English crate ‘hurdle, basket’, or occasionally perhaps from crete ‘cradle’, probably applied as a metonymic occupational name for a maker of such articles. Alternatively, sometimes perhaps a variant of Croft 1.

variants.name: Crofts
meanings: English: variant of Croft , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Groft
meanings: English: perhaps an altered form of   Croft  .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Croft was born in 1458, in Croft, Herefordshire, England, her father, Richard de Croft I, was 31 and her mother, Eleanor Cornewall, was 23. She married Thomas Blount about 1470, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 12 daughters. She died on 27 September 1549, in Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91, and was buried in Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Croft est née en 1458, à Croft, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Croft I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Cornewall, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Blount environ 1470, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 12 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 septembre 1549, à Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterrée à Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Croft 1458 in Croft, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Croft I 31 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Cornewall 23. Sie hat um 1470 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Blount geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 12 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. September 1549 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Croft è nata il nel 1458 nel Croft, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Richard de Croft I, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Cornewall, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Blount circa 1470, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 12 figlie. Morì il 27 settembre 1549, nel Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolta a Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Croftが1458年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクロフトで生まれた時，父Richard de Croft Iは31歳，母Eleanor Cornewallは23歳であった。約1470年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアでThomas Blountと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と12人の娘の親であった。彼女は1549年9月27日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアキッドエルミンスターで91歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアキッドエルミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Croft(이)가 1458년 영국 허퍼드실르 크로프트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Croft I(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Cornewall(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Thomas Blount(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1549년 9월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 키더민스터에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 키더민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Croft nasceu em 1458, em Croft, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Croft I, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Cornewall, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Blount aproximadamente 1470, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 12 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de setembro de 1549, em Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 91 anos, e foi sepultada em Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Croft родилась в 1458 г. в местности крофт, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Croft I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Cornewall, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Blount около 1470 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 12 дочерей. Она умерла 27 сентября 1549 г. в местности киддирминстир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год и была похоронена в местности киддирминстир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.between 1485 and 1490: mai le 1485 e o'o I le 1490

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Croft nació en 1458, en Croft, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Croft I, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Eleanor Cornewall, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Thomas Blount aproximadamente 1470, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 12 hijas. Murió el 27 de septiembre de 1549, en Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultada en Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
